mapper.select: select * from t_sign_record where user_id=#{userId} and sign_date=#{signDate} limit 1
select * from t_sign_record where user_id=#{userId} order by sign_date desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into t_sign_record(user_id, sign_date, points, continuous_days, is_repair, create_time) values(#{userId}, #{signDate}, #{points}, #{continuousDays}, coalesce(#{isRepair},'0'), sysdate())
